# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/runner/work/3D-1D-coupling-dev/3D-1D-coupling-dev/build2/svMultiPhysics-build
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Initial cache

//Enable/Disable color output during build.

//CXX compiler

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-13

//Initial cache
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:STRING=/usr/bin/cc

MPIEXEC_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=MPIEXEC_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Maximum number of processors available to run MPI applications.
MPIEXEC_MAX_NUMPROCS:STRING=1

//Flag used by MPI to specify the number of processes for mpiexec;
// the next option will be the number of processes.
MPIEXEC_NUMPROC_FLAG:STRING=-n

//These flags will be placed after all flags passed to mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_POSTFLAGS:STRING=

//These flags will be directly before the executable that is being
// run by mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_PREFLAGS:STRING=

MPI_CXX_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

SV_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

SV_LIBRARY_TYPE:STRING=STATIC

//Initial cache
SV_LOCAL_VTK_PATH:STRING=

//Initial cache
SV_PETSC_DIR:STRING=

//The distribution platform being used.
SV_PLATFORM_DIR:STRING=ubuntu

//The distribution platform version being used.
SV_PLATFORM_VERSION_DIR:STRING=24.04

//This specificies which install dir and GUIDs to use, is also
// used in header files
SV_RELEASE_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Value Computed by CMake
SV_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/3D-1D-coupling-dev/3D-1D-coupling-dev/Code

//Option to suppress all compiler warnings while compiling
SV_SUPPRESS_WARNINGS:BOOL=ON

//Add Intel Runtime Libraries (these may be needed by some libraries)
SV_USE_INTEL:BOOL=OFF

//Use Eigen headers
SV_USE_INTERNAL_EIGEN:BOOL=ON

//Use the internal GKlib library
SV_USE_INTERNAL_GKLIB:BOOL=ON

//Use the internal metis library
SV_USE_INTERNAL_METIS:BOOL=ON

//Use the internal parmetis library
SV_USE_INTERNAL_PARMETIS:BOOL=ON

//Use MSMPI
SV_USE_MPI:BOOL=ON

//Use MSMPI
SV_USE_MSMPI:BOOL=OFF

//Use notimer
SV_USE_NOTIMER:BOOL=ON

//Use system gklib_internal
SV_USE_SYSTEM_GKLIB_INTERNAL:BOOL=OFF

//Use system metis_internal
SV_USE_SYSTEM_METIS_INTERNAL:BOOL=OFF

//Use system MPI
SV_USE_SYSTEM_MPI:BOOL=ON

//Use system parmetis_internal
SV_USE_SYSTEM_PARMETIS_INTERNAL:BOOL=OFF

//Use system tetgen
SV_USE_SYSTEM_TETGEN:BOOL=OFF

//Use system tinyxml
SV_USE_SYSTEM_TINYXML:BOOL=OFF

//Use tetgen library
SV_USE_TETGEN:BOOL=ON

//Initial cache
SV_USE_TRILINOS:BOOL=OFF

//Use Windows registry to obtain certain settings (install mode)
SV_USE_WIN32_REGISTRY:BOOL=OFF

//Use ZLib
SV_USE_ZLIB:BOOL=ON

//Test CMAKE_HAVE_LIBC_PTHREAD
CMAKE_HAVE_LIBC_PTHREAD:INTERNAL=1

// project
CMAKE_HOME_DIRECTORY:INTERNAL=/home/runner/work/3D-1D-coupling-dev/3D-1D-coupling-dev/Code
